author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (eHCI + iommufd eventq):

- drivers/usb/host-ehci.md: covers drivers/usb/host/ehci-*.c (~7800 lines across 8 files: ehci-hcd + ehci-hub + ehci-mem + ehci-q + ehci-sched + ehci-pci + ehci-platform + ehci-timer) — eHCI 1.0 USB-2.0 high-speed (480 Mbit/s) host controller: per-controller MMIO regs (CAPLENGTH/HCSPARAMS/HCCPARAMS/USBCMD/USBSTS/USBINTR/FRINDEX/CTRLDSSEGMENT/PERIODICLISTBASE/ASYNCLISTADDR/CONFIGFLAG/PORTSC[N]), QH/qTD async-list (control + bulk, HW round-robin every µframe), 1024-entry periodic-frame-list (interrupt + isoch indexed by FRINDEX[12:3]), iTD per HS isoch transfer (8 µframes/iTD), sITD for FS-via-HS-companion split-transfer, IsoStream + IsoSched per-stream, per-port companion-controller hand-off via PORT_OWNER bit (LS/FS auto-routed to oHCI/uHCI), IAA-deferred QH unlink, HSE handler halt+reset, per-vendor quirk table (Intel ICH/PCH + AMD HudsonD/Bolton + ASMedia/NVIDIA/VIA/SiS), system PM with state save/restore + force-quirks for lost-context PCH. 12 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (qh-UAF + pool-OOB + periodic-idx-OOB + bandwidth-consistent) / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus enqueue↔complete round-trip.
- drivers/iommu/iommufd-eventq.md: covers iommufd/eventq.c (~540 lines) — PRI fault eventq for VMM userspace fault delivery (alternative to in-kernel SVA path): IOMMU_FAULT_QUEUE_ALLOC ioctl + per-eventq fd, per-eventq read returns iommufd_fault_event (pasid + prgi + iova + flags + source_id), per-PRGI fault group coalescing with LAST_FAULT_IN_GROUP bit, per-eventq write accepts iommufd_fault_response (pasid + prgi + code SUCCESS/INVALID/FAILURE) → per-vendor iommu_ops->page_response sends PCIe-spec PRG-Response to device, poll/epoll integration, per-device PRI register/unregister (single-eventq enforcement via -EBUSY on duplicate), eventq destroy drained pending groups with INVALID default-response, separate VEVENT eventq for VIOMMU virtual events, per-fault rate-limit inherited from per-IOMMU PRQ rate-limit. 10 REQ / 7 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (eventq-UAF + group-UAF + prgi-uniqueness + read-write-balanced) / Layer-2 ref to pasid_lifecycle.tla / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus device-fault → userspace-handle → device-retry round-trip.

Total state: 272 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 38 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set (38): + ehci + iommufd-eventq.

Knowledge pages: design-drivers-usb-host-ehci, design-drivers-iommu-iommufd-eventq.

Next iter plan: drivers/iommu/iommufd-vfio-compat.md (legacy VFIO type1 container shim for transition window) + virt/kvm/eventfd.md (KVM_IRQFD + KVM_IOEVENTFD bypass mechanism for vhost + KVM_VFIO IRQ forwarding).
